faqs.question: How much does ant control cost in Elizabeth, NJ?
faqs.answer: Ant control services in Elizabeth typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and type of ant species present. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before beginning any treatment.

faqs.question: What types of ants are common in Elizabeth, New Jersey?
faqs.answer: Elizabeth homeowners most frequently encounter carpenter ants, pavement ants, odorous house ants, and pharaoh ants. Carpenter ants are particularly concerning as they can damage wooden structures common in Elizabeth's older homes. Our technicians identify the specific species to ensure the most effective treatment approach.
